form.formComment: Useful type. Freshened for 38 days. Last start favourite; won by 3.5 len Sandown Park on March 7 over 4000m slow track defeating Glen Road carrying 69.5kg at $3.30 in a steeplechase. Run before held ground to the line finished second of 11 runners at Hereford on January 12 over 4200m, slow track; 4.5 len behind Rodney with 74.5kg at $7. Has been racing well. Can go right on with the job.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up finished third in a small field at Kempton Park on March 14 over 3600m, 14 len behind Secret Des Dieux carrying 67.5kg at $4.50. Last start won by 0.8 len Stratford-On-Avon on March 28 over 4500m defeating Classic King carrying 69kg at $3.50 in a steeplechase. Go close. Likely to figure prominently again.

form.formComment: Comes off a 47 day let-up. Last outing finished third of 8 starters at Taunton on February 26 over 4600m, 6 len behind Ede'iffs Rock carrying 75.5kg at $7. The run before fell at Wincanton on January 15 over 5000m. Rates well. In the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). Comes off a 47 day let-up. Last outing finished third of 8 starters at Taunton on February 26 over 4600m, 6 len behind Ede'iffs Rock carrying 75.5kg at $7. The run before fell at Wincanton on January 15 over 5000m. Rates well. In the mix again.

form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Last outing finished second of 11 runners at Newbury on March 20 over 4500m, 1.5 len behind King Califet carrying 72kg at $12. Before that led throughout and just faded finished third of 8 starters at Newbury on February 17 over 4700m, on slow going 8 len behind As The Fella Says carrying 68kg at $10. Sure to improve again. Will take some stopping.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9.5). Recent form impressive for this race. form.formComment: Comes off a 31 day let-up. Last start finished third in a small field at Fontwell Park on March 14 over 3900m, on slow going 33 len behind Mon Champion with 74kg at $4.30. Before that tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily finished fifth of 10 runners at Windsor on January 16 over 4400m, slow track; 15 len behind Officer Of State with 70kg at $9.50. Big task ahead.
